reviews.review_title: We need to make a comeback
reviews.review_description: This game in its prime had so much players and I made many friends, but.. this game died a couple years ago and every lobby is empty, I miss this game…

i used to have a positive review, but ive changed my mind.
the idea of the game is pretty good, use monke movement, and also fly.
however, this is executed poorly
its way to hard to learn, its buggy, and it is easily abused.
anyways, next point.
the toxic playerbase is genuinly annoying. its a bunch of jmancurly fans yelling slurs and teaching people how to escape the map.
speaking of which, there is way to many children in this game, its not even funny.
please add an "under 13" report option.
finally, its not in the title, however the developer often responds to reviews, and they are obviously written by them.
however, the dev is also kinda annoying, complaining that "one star is harsh."
yes, we choose one star because we dont like it. the worst part? my original negative review got me BANNED from his game. how childish are you to get mad over a one star review in your cashgrab game??

I gave 5 star cause I can 

can u get banned?
Please download this game was so good I’m about to cry because how peak frog fryers and this game was
Loved this game bro
the movement and the game is very confusing there’s not many maps that are good and there are not many cosmetics that are good and the colors are confusing￼
monke also I spent hundreds of dollars in that game
My kids loved it until my daughter got a ban, and all she did was mute ppl who are being mean to her.

developer_response.body: She was reported by people she was reporting. That happens in online games. Come on back and try again. The community is pretty good most of the time.

reviews.review_description: This game is so fun it’s way ￼better than gorilla tag this game is the best and there’s a lot of nice people on this game and the moderators are so nice I just love this game 5 stars ￼🌟

I love this game specifically because it stands out to me because of the player base but more because of the movement, I adored gorilla tags movement but didn't enjoy the game because the community was too toxic for my liking. The game itself doesn't receive as many updates as we all hope for, the community is mainly made up of kids and there are a few toxic ones here and there, but that's what the mute and report buttons are for. The owner is an incredibly gentle guy, very nice to talk to. There isn't very much to do in the game if you get bored of doing the "same" thing over and over but this game doesn't stand out for the variety of activities, Moreso it stands out because of the community out of every other game I've played similar to this. The player base isn't very high at the minute but hopefully will skyrocket because this game deserves it. There are moderators that take care of the game almost 24/7 but some of them could do with being more active I feel like. Overall a brilliant game and deserves better.
PLAY IT NOW RIGHT NOW OF RIGHT NOW AT THIS MOMENT RIGHT NOW GRRRRRR PLAY RIGHT THIS MOMENT AAAAAAAAAAA OR ELSE GRRRRRR YOU MAKE THE ALPHA ANGRY AND YOU DONT WANNA DO THAT…😡😡😡😡😡 11/10

I always wanted to fly, glide, and be bird like. The developer is very nice. He unbanned me! But one thing I need to tell the developer. Is to make bigger maps. But keep developing the game. This game can get really popular! Here are a few acorns(:

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review. That's a good idea to have larger maps. I'm on it!

reviews.review_description: I was playing in the lobby and then an admin within the lobby and then I just grabbed them and they said touch my ears, you disappears, and then he went up onto the board and banned me for two days for no reason leave on banned me my name is Cadeomg

developer_response.body:
I've added in game moderators, updated the ban system and added a button to force people to let go of you if they are holding on.

UPDATE: We reviewed the incident and can clearly see this was not your fault. The ban has been removed. Also, that person is no longer an admin in the game. Sorry about that.

reviews.review_title: its just  gorilla tag but worse
reviews.review_description:
movement on ground is 10 times worse

air movement is bad

maps have no textures and stuff

overall just a bad experience 

go play gorilla tag its this but better

developer_response.body: Sorry, you didn't like my game. I'm not trying to be Gorilla Tag. I just want to give players the feeling of flying in a peaceful, fun place. I hope you consider the game again after I do some more work on it. Thanks.

reviews.review_description: first of all, this is a blatant copy of gorilla tag. same swinging mechanic, same annoying fandom full of 8 year old racists, and even the same species. so because of that, im gonna compare it to that. first of all the swinging feels alot worse then in gt. its really floaty and awkward. in gt the swining feels more natural.the maps in this game are also kind lame. they are just bland and lack places where you can swing very well. overall if your gonna make a blatant copy of gt at the very least ad something somewhat original

Now hear me out here okay this game is a gorilla tag rip off lemming (the creator of gorilla tag made a game only using you hands to move and you re a gorilla in gorilla tag I'm feel like this is a major rip off (FYI gorilla tag came out March 12 2021

developer_response.body:
Hey, I love GT too!

I only made the game after Lemming open sourced the movement code for GT to encourage other people to use walking on hands. 

I did not use any of his code. I all my wrote my own. Lemming has no problem with my game.
